4 ?70 0101000001 3

Constant
4 C 4 1111111111 a mismatch

Unary 7
4 I 7 1100100111 6 mismatch
4 I 7n 0011011000 4 mismatch

Unary 0
4 I 0 1001100110 5 mismatch
4 I 0n 0110011001 5 mismatch

Binary 70
4 AND 70 1000100110 4 mismatch
4 AND 70n 0111011001 6 mismatch
4 OR 70 1101100111 7 mismatch
4 OR 70n 0010011000 3 mismatch
4 XOR 70 0101000001 3 match 1/1
all match XOR 70
4 XOR 70n 1010111110 7 mismatch
4 AND-NOT 70 0100000001 2 mismatch
4 AND-NOT 70n 1011111110 8 mismatch
4 OR-NOT 70 1110111111 9 mismatch

0 I 3

Extending defaults
4 0101000001 3
Starting at I 6 increasing
I 7 1100100111 partial 0110011001 5
left 5
Starting at I 1 decreasing
I 0 1001100110 partial 0011011000 4
right 4

4 I 7

Selected
0 I 3
1 I 4
2 I 5
3 I 6
4 XOR 70
5 I 1
6 I 2
7 I 3

Applying to 00010011
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 3 = 1
1 I 4 = 0
2 I 5 = 0
3 I 6 = 1
4 XOR 70 = XOR(I 7,I 0) = XOR(1,0) = 1
5 I 1 = 0
6 I 2 = 0
7 I 3 = 1

\boxed{10011001}
